revision.comment: Restore dated category per [[User talk:AnomieBOT#Not dating expert tags]]
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Backlog}} {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} This is a subgroup of [[:Category:Articles needing attention]]. Use the {{tl|Expert-subject}} tag to put articles in this category and sort them by topic. This category is being sorted by [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Expert Request Sorting]]. If a subcategory does not exist the article will be categorised as "[[:Category:Miscellaneous articles needing expert attention|Miscellaneous]]". {{See also|Wikipedia:Expert help|Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup}} This category is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Wikipedia articles with content issues]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles needing attention| Expert]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Wikipedia expert help]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Category:Articles needing expert attention]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
